Chapter 76

It is Si Yiming who pursues you again.
In the end, Gu Bai chose to take the initiative to reject the kindness of the
brother and the teacher.
The first time he did such a thing, when he called the teacher, his voice was
dry and at a loss.
But Professor Gao didn’t mean to blame him, he just repeatedly asked him
whether he was sure and whether he had decided.
In the eyes of Gu Bai’s teacher, Gu Bai’s rejection of this recommendation
is like rejecting the path to his future success.
The student is so old, he does not have the right to intervene in the student’s
life, even if this is a very important thing for Gu Bai’s future.
He just repeatedly confirmed with Gu Bai, and explained the severity of the
matter to him in detail.
Gu Bai was rejecting a broad road leading to a better future.
In addition to the most essential beauty of art, which is a matter of different
opinions, newcomers want to be famous, awards are one of the first, and
connections are the second.
Introducing Gu Bai into that circle was profitable and harmless to him,
especially since Gu Bai’s goal has always been clear, he wants to take a
purely artistic path.
There are no awards, no personal connections, no advanced education
qualifications, pure art is not easy, after all, some awards also focus on
academic qualifications and connections.
And certain titles conferred by the state are especially important for
people’s connections.
These Gu Bai may not understand, but Professor Gao, who has been rolling
in the circle for most of his life, knows it very well.
This circle says big and big, but small but also small. Most people’s ascent
paths are not far from each other. They pull one by one and introduce each
other to keep warm.
He had to make Gu Bai clearly aware of this and make a decision after
careful consideration.
This is the most basic ethics of being a teacher.
Gu Bai listened to the teacher’s analysis of the pros and cons on the phone,
and responded with a loud voice.
He responded and waited until the teacher had finished speaking before
taking a deep breath and whispering: “I know, I have already decided.”
“…” Professor Gao was silent for a while, and couldn’t help saying again,
“Are you really sure?”
Gu Bai nodded. After realizing that the teacher could not see, he hesitated
for a while and said, “Mr. Si said that he was recommended to me by the
teacher.”
There was another long silence on the other end of the phone.
Gu Bai realized with hindsight that saying this would make the teacher feel
sad–it was like saying that he trusted Mr. Si more than the teacher.
Gu Bai lowered his eyes, opened his mouth and tightened his lips, staring
nervously at his toes, his brain buzzing.
He didn’t know how to deal with such a situation. Unintentionally hurting
people was also hurting. This object was still a teacher who took care of
him a lot.
Gu Bai frantically tightened the hem of his clothes and said, “Teacher, I…”
“Very good.” Professor Gao interrupted Gu Bai, his voice didn’t sound too
angry, even with a little uplift of joy, “I almost forgot that you know those
amazing people, that of Zhai Liangjun. The team came to me some time ago
to find material for the documentary.”
Gu Bai se sorprendió.
“Very good.” Professor Gao said again.
Gu Bai has always been so down-to-earth, sincere, and hardworking,
causing the teachers and seniors to subconsciously feel that Gu Bai is
always the poor fresh graduate who is running for money.
But think about it carefully, Gu Bai has become famous in the new life
circle recently.
To say that he is a leading new artist is definitely recognized.
Moreover, Gu Bai had followed Si Yiming to do two separate orders before,
plus the three projects they knew, Gu Bai shouldn’t be short of money.
Professor Gao is not a prudent person. On the contrary, he is very happy to
see that this student with a sincere heart can have the opportunity to go
higher and farther.
Being able to take the boat of the boss Yiming is also quite powerful.
Professor Gao thought of the big guy and thought of the worries of his
apprentices these days, and couldn’t help but laugh twice and said, “Si
Yiming is a very nice person.”
Gu Bai blinked in confusion, “Well… Mr. Si is very good.”
“Some of us Gu Bai are in pain.” Professor Gao sighed like an old father.
Gu Bai couldn’t help but bend his eyebrows.
He has always been hurt by people, Gu Bai thought, when he was young,
people hurt him. There are people who are familiar and unfamiliar. Most
human beings are kind to others.
If he hadn’t always met good people, Gu Bai felt that he wouldn’t be able to
grow up like he is now.
“Gu Bai, did you promise Si Yiming?” Professor Gao asked.
“What? Did Mr. Si help me find a teacher?” Gu Bai said blankly.
Of course, it is impossible for Gu Bai to object to Bai Ze being a teacher.
Gu Bai and Bai Ze are the only two people in the sky and the earth who can
draw spiritual paintings, and there is no one else who can teach him except
Bai Ze.
“No, I mean he pursues you.”
Gu Bai: ...
Gu Bai :? ? ?
¿Que que? !
...
Mr. Si has been in a good mood these past few days, so good that the
monsters who have a calm face and always violently beat people after
seeing him too many times when he is pulled back by foreign aid are
amazed.
This Pixiu spring breeze was full of pride, and it was so pleasant to the
naked eye that he barely put the word “happy” on his face.
The monsters couldn’t understand why Si Yiming was really happy, but this
didn’t prevent them from feeling fortunate.
It’s better than being beaten anyway!
Who wants to worry about being beaten every day, even if the skin is rough
and fleshy.
In order to avoid this Pai Yao suddenly remembering that he still has the
function of beating against illegal monsters, there are not many monsters in
the entire building that would approach Si Yiming.
But there are always exceptions to everything, such as Zhai Liangjun, who
needs to check with Si Yiming, or thank you, who is serious and reasonable,
but is rarely educated by violence.
Although Zhai Liangjun has been busy lately, he can be proud of it, because
although he perfectly demonstrated a wrong way of dating a girl, the results
obtained are quite good.
At least Huang Yining faced his confession again, without taking his words
as a malicious joke again.
Mr. Zhai was moved and crying. After Ms. Huang began to face his
feelings, Mr. Zhai was even more energetic. He didn’t feel tired even when
he turned every day. The monsters under his hands called him a perpetual
motion machine .
Except for Zhai Liangjun, thank you.
Mr. Xie is different from Mr. Zhai. He has just concluded a big case and is
very busy now.
Xie Zhi has a pretty good relationship with Si Yiming. The main reason
may be that he is different from other monsters. Hachi, a **** beast, is
famous for his rules.
Speaking of rules is very good in today’s predominantly human society. In
the early days, Xie Zhi was established as a typical six-unit benchmark by
Si Yiming.
Every time Xie Zhi got in front of Si Yiming, it was always when he was
sure that he would not be beaten.
Don’t look at Si Yiming’s fierce appearance, but he is actually very
disciplined.
He didn’t make a mistake or offend him, he wouldn’t do it.
Of course, the time when these monsters used other monsters as snacks in
ancient times does not count.
After Bai Ze appeared, these beasts, which could easily change the world,
became a lot easier to communicate.
For example, now, if you join in, you won’t be beaten.
Xie Zhi came back from get off work and ran into Si Yiming in the elevator
who was also coming back from outside.
He looked at Si Yiming and asked, “Did not pick up Gu Bai today?”
Si Yiming tilted his head to look at him: “Well, he doesn’t like this very
much.”
Xie Zhi gave Si Yiming a surprised look, and then said, “Nonsense.”
Si Yiming was taken aback, frowning: “What?”
“Don’t you know?” Xie Zhi gave him a weird look. “I thought it was your
method.”
Mr. Si looked even more surprised: “What means?”
“Boil Gu Bai in warm water.” Xie replied.
Mr. Si was surprised to find that with his wit, he didn’t even understand
what the thanks.
Mr. Xie was surprised to find that Si Yiming was completely unaware of his
misdeeds.
Xie Zhi couldn’t believe it: “You didn’t mean it?”
“No.” Mr. Si reflexively replied, and then asked again, “What did I do?”
“Gu Bai is very upset recently-during your absence.” Mr. Xie said.
“Obviously, he has become accustomed to the fact that you are by his side.
You disappeared suddenly, and his mood has obviously become depressed.”
If Si Yiming disappeared suddenly and Gu Bai’s reaction was obviously
abnormal, Xie Zhi would not have noticed this.
At that time, Xie Zhi was still feeling that Si Yiming, an old beast, was
really a good method. He was silent on weekdays, but he didn’t expect that
the man with thick eyebrows and eyes would be so contemplative.
Si Yiming looked at Xie Zhi and finally understood what he was referring
to.
So he acted happier, even a clear smile appeared on his face.
Xie Zhi couldn’t believe it. He looked at Si Yiming and asked unwillingly:
“You…you run to his house every day, take him out to play, take him to and
from get off work, and bring all his office tools to his house. You put a set,
didn’t you really mean it?”
“No.” Si Yiming replied simply, raising his leg and stepping out of the
elevator.
Realmente no pensó en eso.
He simply likes the little boy to take care of the little boy. Although this
innocence has changed in the end, his starting point is indeed very pure.
Si Yiming walked out of the elevator, paused, turned his head to look at Xie
Zhi, and raised his hand to hold the elevator door.
He asked thanks: “By the way, do you know who the emperor has the
money…”
Before he finished speaking, the elevator door next to him opened suddenly,
and Gu Bai walked out from inside.
Si Yiming comió.
Gu Bai stayed for two seconds, just when Si Yiming thought he would greet
him, Gu Bai suddenly turned his head and ran away.
Si Yiming: …?
